title: Hajial Chase
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hajial Chase''' was a primeval [[hiakk tree]] [[Forest/Legends|forest]] on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]], roughly four hundred kilometers inland from [[Phemiss]]. The Chase was more a section of forest than a forest itself; it was a flat, heavily wooded area separated by the surrounding forest by steep cliffs. [[Rikknit/Legends|Rikknits]] were abundant in the high trees, and the forest floor was home to unique creatures, such as striders and foragers.

Hajial Chase was utterly annihilated when a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] bioweapon razed New Plympto in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].
